identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

rules: Use 'Noto Sans Tamil' for all Tamil text content.
Headings must be bold and expressive.
Body text must have relaxed line-height for readability.

usage.primary: Primary actions, active states, key branding elements
usage.secondary: Success states, growth indicators, secondary buttons
usage.accent: Earthy elements, soil data, grounding visuals

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

strategies: Mobile-First: Design for small screens first, then expand.
Bento Grid: Use varied span sizes for dashboard widgets (1x1, 2x1, 2x2).
Card-Based: Use distinct cards for data isolation.
High Contrast: Ensure text is readable outdoors (sunlight).

specifics.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-md. High contrast text.
specifics.cards: White background, subtle border, soft shadow.
specifics.charts: Recharts with custom earthy color palette.

components.interactive_elements: MUST include data-testid attribute for all interactive elements.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain or noise overlay on backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (default). Use Phosphor Icons for specific agri-needs if available.
visual_enhancers.motion: Framer Motion for smooth transitions. Staggered entrance for lists.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance. High contrast for outdoor usage.

multilingual.font_switching: Dynamically switch font-family based on selected language (Manrope for EN, Noto Sans Tamil for TA).
multilingual.layout_adaptation: Account for text expansion in Tamil (approx 20-30% longer).

rules: NEVER show a single prediction value.
ALWAYS include a 'Worst Case' scenario explanation.
Use color coding (Green/Orange/Red) to reinforce risk levels.
Provide 2-3 options, never a single recommendation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'AgroRisk AI+ Marketplace' as a React SPA.
Use the provided color palette and typography.
Ensure all text is translatable via translations.json.
Build the 10 modules as distinct components/pages.
Use the 'Bento' grid for the main dashboard.
Integrate the risk communication rules into every data display.
Use the provided image URLs for mock data.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
Do not use backend APIs; mock all data locally.
Ensure the app is mobile-responsive and touch-friendly.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Use named exports for components and default exports for pages.
